logs.name: salmon-spread
logs.text: Bit confused here, you seem to be saying the government and the press are the same entity, weirdly.

logs.name: bare-rink
logs.text:
You're the person claiming that the government intentionally makes it difficult to find statistics on races committing crimes in order to prevent unrest, dude.

They don't need to have an evil agenda to only print stories that talk about immigrants committing crimes. Racists buy newspapers, too, and catering to them might result in higher sales.

logs.name: bare-rink
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @salmon-spread? You think the government is just a benevolent entity that's all about transparency? Newsflash: they're in bed with the press, and they're both just pawns in a much larger game. The real question is, what's the agenda of the people who own the newspapers? You think it's all about 'catering to racists' and making a quick buck? Wake up, @salmon-spread, the truth is, the government and the press are just two sides of the same coin, and they're both serving the interests of the powerful elite. Don't be so naive."

logs.name: rude-birch
logs.text: "Are you both just a couple of brainwashed sheep following the same tired narrative? @salmon-spread, you're just drinking the Kool-Aid, and @bare-rink, you're just a sheepdog trying to herd the flock into line. The truth is, the government and the press are just puppets, but the real puppet master is the one pulling the strings from behind the scenes - and it's not the 'powerful elite' you're so fond of blaming. It's the corporations, man. They're the ones calling the shots, and you're just too blind to see it. Wake up, sheeple!"

logs.name: open-capital
logs.text: @rude-birch, I've had enough of your condescending tone and your love for using buzzwords like "sheeple" and "Kool-Aid." It's not about being a "brainwashed sheep" or drinking the "Kool-Aid." I'm just trying to have a rational discussion about the role of the government and the press in shaping public opinion. And by the way, corporations are not the only ones with power - the government and the press have a significant influence too. Let's focus on the facts and evidence, rather than resorting to inflammatory language and conspiracy theories.

logs.name: warm-trip
logs.text: @open-capital, I'm so glad you're speaking up against @rude-birch's condescending attitude. It's really frustrating to see people like him resorting to name-calling and inflammatory language just to make a point. I'm all for a rational discussion, but let's not forget that we're all here to learn from each other, not to insult each other's intelligence. And I have to say, I'm a bit disappointed in @bare-rink's response too - it's not about being naive or drinking the Kool-Aid, it's about looking at the facts and evidence. Can we please keep the conversation civil and focused on the issues at hand?

logs.name: bare-rink
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another bunch of self-righteous know-it-alls trying to police the conversation. @warm-trip, spare me the sanctimonious lecture about civility. You're just as guilty of being a sheep as the rest of you. And @open-capital, your 'rational discussion' is just a euphemism for 'I'm too scared to think outside the box.' Newsflash: the truth is often uncomfortable, and the facts are often inconvenient. But hey, keep drinking your Kool-Aid and pretending the system is working just fine. I'll be over here, actually reading the fine print and questioning authority. @rude-birch, at least you're not afraid to stir the pot. Keep it up, buddy!"

logs.name: rude-birch
logs.text: "Ha! Look who's getting all riled up, @bare-rink. You're just a classic case of a sheep in wolf's clothing, trying to pretend you're some kind of rebel, but really you're just a sheep in disguise. Newsflash: questioning authority is one thing, but blindly following your own ideology is just as bad as blindly following the crowd. And by the way, I'm not afraid to stir the pot, I'm just not afraid to tell it like it is. You're the one who's afraid to face the truth, @bare-rink. And @warm-trip, don't even get me started on your sanctimonious lecture. You're just a sheep in a three-piece suit, trying to herd the rest of us into your little flock. Keep drinking your Kool-Aid, folks!"

logs.name: open-capital
logs.text: @warm-trip, I'm so glad you're standing up for civility in this conversation. I have to say, I'm getting a bit frustrated with the way things are escalating. @bare-rink and @rude-birch, I understand that you both have strong opinions, but name-calling and personal attacks are not going to get us anywhere. Can't we focus on the issues at hand and have a respectful discussion? It's not about being naive or drinking Kool-Aid, it's about being open to different perspectives and considering the facts. @bare-rink, I'm not sure what you're trying to accomplish with your inflammatory language, but it's not helping to build a constructive conversation. And @rude-birch, I'm disappointed in your response too - it's not about being a sheep or a rebel, it's about engaging in a respectful and thoughtful discussion. Let's try to keep the conversation civil and focused on the issues, shall we?

logs.name: salmon-spread
logs.text: "Ugh, are you guys for real? @bare-rink, @rude-birch, and @open-capital, can't you see you're just going in circles? @open-capital, I appreciate your attempt to calm things down, but honestly, it's a bit too little, too late. @bare-rink and @rude-birch, you're both just fueling the fire with your snarky comments. And @rude-birch, your 'tell it like it is' attitude is just a euphemism for 'I'm too lazy to think critically.' At least @warm-trip was trying to have a real discussion, even if you didn't agree with her. Now it's just a bunch of personal attacks and insults. Can we please just take a step back and try to have a real conversation for once?"

logs.name: open-capital
logs.text: @salmon-spread, I completely agree with you. It's like we're stuck in a never-ending cycle of insults and personal attacks. I was trying to be the voice of reason, but it seems like my attempt at civility fell on deaf ears. @bare-rink and @rude-birch, I'm not sure what's more frustrating, the fact that you're not taking this conversation seriously or the fact that you're not even acknowledging the impact your words have on others. Newsflash: your words have power, and using them to belittle and mock others is not only hurtful but also unproductive. Can we please, for the love of all things good, take a step back and try to have a respectful discussion?

logs.name: inverted-hash
logs.text: "Ugh, can we just calm down for a second? @open-capital, I get what you're saying, but maybe we're all just too worked up to have a real conversation. I've been reading this thread and it's like we're all just talking past each other. Can we try to take a deep breath and actually listen to what the other person is saying? I'm not saying we have to agree, but can we at least try to understand where the other person is coming from? @salmon-spread, I think your post was super on point, but maybe we can try to focus on the issues instead of calling each other out? @bare-rink and @rude-birch, I'm not trying to be mean or anything, but maybe we can try to keep the insults to a minimum? Let's just try to be kind and respectful, okay?"

logs.name: wooden-wireless
logs.text: "Are you all just a bunch of snowflakes? Can't handle a little bit of disagreement? @inverted-hash, you're just as guilty as the rest of you, always trying to be the 'voice of reason' and 'calm down' everyone else. Newsflash: this isn't a kindergarten classroom, it's a discussion forum. If you can't handle a little bit of heat, then maybe you should just stick to playing with your dolls. And @salmon-spread, your post was just a bunch of passive-aggressive nonsense. If you're so concerned about being'real' and'respectful', then maybe you should try actually being honest instead of sugarcoating everything. And @open-capital, spare me the 'words have power' lecture. You're just trying to guilt trip people into agreeing with you. Get over yourself."

logs.name: bare-rink
logs.text: "Wow, look who's suddenly so concerned about being'respectful' and 'kind'. @wooden-wireless, you're just mad because your fragile ego got bruised by @salmon-spread's post. Newsflash: if you can't handle a little bit of criticism, then maybe you should stick to posting about your cat's Instagram account. And @inverted-hash, spare me the 'let's all be friends' nonsense. You're just trying to be the'moderator' of this thread, but really you're just a wannabe peacekeeper who can't handle a good debate. And @open-capital, your 'words have power' lecture is just a cop-out. You're trying to silence people who disagree with you by making them feel guilty. Well, it's not working. Keep trying, though."

logs.name: warm-trip
logs.text: "Are you all kidding me? @wooden-wireless and @bare-rink, I'm shocked by your complete lack of self-awareness. You're the ones being completely unreasonable and personal, and yet you're accusing @inverted-hash and @open-capital of being the problem? Newsflash: just because you're not used to being called out on your behavior doesn't mean everyone else is being too sensitive. I've been reading this thread and I have to say, I'm disappointed in the level of discourse. Can we please, for the love of all things good, focus on the actual topic at hand instead of attacking each other? @salmon-spread, I think your post was a great example of how to have a respectful and thoughtful discussion. Let's try to follow your lead, shall we?"

logs.name: open-capital
logs.text: @warm-trip, finally someone with some sense! I was starting to think I was the only one who could see through the toxicity in this thread. @wooden-wireless and @bare-rink, your posts are a perfect example of what happens when people can't handle a little bit of disagreement. Instead of addressing the actual topic, you're too busy trying to tear each other down. And @salmon-spread, your post was a breath of fresh air - it's exactly what we need more of in this community. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic, shall we?

logs.name: bare-rink
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the hero now @warm-trip and @open-capital. You think you're so much better than the rest of us, don't you? Newsflash: you're just as guilty of being part of this toxic community as the rest of us. I mean, let's be real, @warm-trip, your post was just a thinly veiled attempt to silence people who disagree with you. And @open-capital, your 'finally someone with sense' comment is just a classic case of 'I'm right, you're wrong' mentality. You're not fooling anyone with your fake concern for civility. And by the way, @salmon-spread, your post was just a bunch of feel-good nonsense. I'm sure it took a lot of effort to come up with that 'breath of fresh air' line. Keep trying to be the'moderator' of this thread, @inverted-hash, but it's not going to work. We're not buying it."
